creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
Updated the xemacs-mule packages ports. I arranged xemacs packages ports for
XEmacs-21.* ports. Deleted and added ports are shown bellow:

[Deletion ports]:
editors/xemacs-base-packages
editors/xemacs-mule-base-packages
[Add ports]:
editors/xemacs-mule-packages(just following)

I also changed current xemacs packages ports. Mostly modifications are :

(1) editors/xemacs-packages change to delete `MULE' function and include
    more packages. 
(2) Existing `SUMO' packages change back to "latest release"

Update files are respecively :

[Delete] :
editors/xemacs-packages/pkg/PLIST.mule

Where I must regret editors/xemacs-packages maintainer Dear Michael Elbel
that any contacts should be done before send-pr this changes.

I put the diff from ports-current in "Fix:".
